site.name: The Long Ball
site.tagline: Digging the data behind the distance.

description: Week-over-week Longball Index movement report generated from Monday leaderboard snapshots.
sourceNotes: Compares saved Longball Index JSON snapshots. Main mover lists require shared qualified hitters and at least 10 new BBE in the current snapshot.

fields.currentSnapshot: Path to the current Longball Index snapshot used for comparison.
fields.previousSnapshot: Path to the previous Monday Longball Index snapshot used for comparison.
fields.biggestLbiRisers: Qualified hitters with the largest positive week-over-week LBI change.
fields.biggestLbiFallers: Qualified hitters with the largest negative week-over-week LBI change.
fields.biggestRankClimbers: Qualified hitters with the largest positive rank movement.
fields.biggestRankFallers: Qualified hitters with the largest negative rank movement.
fields.newTop25Entrants: Hitters entering the current Top 25 after missing the previous Top 25.
fields.newQualifiers: Hitters who are newly present in the qualified current leaderboard.

newQualifiers.note: Newly qualified for the LBI leaderboard
Newly qualified for the LBI leaderboard
